# Shiv Mines and Minerals

> Silica sand mining company based in Karauli, Rajasthan, India, operating since 2006. Shiv Mines and Minerals mines, washes, grades and supplies silica sand (SiO₂) for construction, industrial, glass, foundry and oil & gas (frac) applications, for domestic supply and export.

Key facts:
- Location: Karauli district, Rajasthan, India (Mining Lease M.L. No. 34/2006)
- Founded: 2006
- Products: construction, industrial (99%+ SiO₂), glass (99.5%+ SiO₂, Fe₂O₃ < 0.02%), foundry, frac and custom-specification silica sand
- Contact: +91-9116758641 · shivmineandminerals@gmail.com

## Products
- [Construction Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/construction-sand): Washed, clay-free silica sand for concrete, mortar, plastering and asphalt.
- [Industrial Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/industrial-sand): High-purity (99%+ SiO₂) silica sand for water filtration, abrasive blasting and chemical processing.
- [Glass Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/glass-sand): Ultra-pure glass grade silica sand (99.5%+ SiO₂, Fe₂O₃ below 0.02%) for container, flat and specialty glass.
- [Foundry Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/foundry-sand): Refractory moulding and core sand for iron, steel and aluminium casting with controlled AFS grain fineness.
- [Frac Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/frac-sand): High-crush-strength monocrystalline proppant for hydraulic fracturing in oil and gas.
- [Custom Specification Sand](https://shivmines.in/products/custom-specification): Silica sand mined, washed and sized to a buyer's exact SiO₂ purity, iron content and particle size distribution.
- [Silica Powder (Quartz Powder)](https://shivmines.in/products/silica-powder): Ground quartz powder in 100 & 200 mesh for adhesives, tile compounds, wall putty, metal polishing compounds, paints and ceramics.
- [Metal Polishing Compound (Luster Bar)](https://shivmines.in/products/metal-polishing-compound): Silica-based luster bar for buffing and shining stainless steel, brass and aluminium.
- [Adhesive & Tile Compound](https://shivmines.in/products/adhesive-tile-compound): Silica-based adhesive for fixing wall and floor tiles, stone and cladding.

## Quality
- [Quality & Lab Analysis](https://shivmines.in/quality): Independent lab analysis — SiO₂ ~96–97%, Fe₂O₃ from 0.076%, whiteness 84–87%. Test certificates on request.

## Company
- [Home](https://shivmines.in/): Overview of Shiv Mines and Minerals and its silica sand products.
- [Silica Sand Supplier in India](https://shivmines.in/silica-sand-supplier-india): Silica sand supplier, manufacturer and exporter in India — own mine in Karauli, Rajasthan since 2006.
- [Silica Sand Exporter from India](https://shivmines.in/silica-sand-exporter-india): Exports construction, industrial, glass, foundry, frac & custom silica sand and silica powder worldwide.
- [All Products](https://shivmines.in/products): Full range of silica sand grades.
- [About](https://shivmines.in/about): Company history, mining operation and capabilities.
- [Contact](https://shivmines.in/contact): Request a quote or get in touch.

## Industries (silica sand by application)
- [Glass Manufacturing](https://shivmines.in/industries/glass-manufacturing): Glass-grade silica sand for container, flat, specialty and solar glass.
- [Foundry & Metal Casting](https://shivmines.in/industries/foundry-metal-casting): AFS-graded foundry sand for iron, steel and aluminium casting.
- [Water Filtration](https://shivmines.in/industries/water-filtration): Graded silica filter media for water treatment and pool filters.
- [Construction & Concrete](https://shivmines.in/industries/construction-concrete): Washed construction sand for concrete, mortar and plaster.
- [Oil & Gas (Fracturing)](https://shivmines.in/industries/oil-and-gas-fracturing): High-crush-strength frac sand proppant.
- [Paints & Coatings](https://shivmines.in/industries/paints-and-coatings): Fine silica filler for durability and finish.
- [Ceramics & Tiles](https://shivmines.in/industries/ceramics-and-tiles): Silica for ceramic bodies and glazes.
- [Sports Turf & Golf](https://shivmines.in/industries/sports-turf-and-golf): Silica sand for bunkers, greens and turf infill.
- [Adhesives & Tile Compounds](https://shivmines.in/industries/adhesives-and-tile-compounds): Silica powder for tile adhesives, wall putty and construction compounds.
- [Metal Polishing Compounds](https://shivmines.in/industries/metal-polishing-compounds): Silica powder for polishing compounds and luster bars.

- [Glass Grade vs Foundry Grade Silica Sand](https://shivmines.in/guides/glass-vs-foundry-silica-sand): Key differences between the two grades.
